---
name: Bug report
about: Something isn't working correctly
labels: bug
---

## Describe the bug
A clear description of what happened vs what you expected.

## Tool
- [ ] `compact_map`
- [ ] `compact_expand`
- [ ] `compact_deps`

## To reproduce
1. File type / approximate size (e.g. "200-line TSX component with 3 hooks")
2. Tool call and arguments
3. What the output was
4. What you expected instead

## Environment
- compact-mcp version: <!-- run `npx compact-mcp --version` -->
- Node.js version: <!-- run `node --version` -->
- OS:
- MCP client (Claude Code / Cursor / other):

## Compressed output (if relevant)
If the tool returned unexpected output, paste it here (you can redact business logic).
